name: US Dollar
flag_desc: solid royal blue background like the US flag canton color, with small white five-pointed stars scattered around the inner edge
notes: Use as the style anchor. Keep the stars secondary to the currency symbol.

name: Euro
flag_desc: royal blue circle with exactly twelve yellow five-pointed stars arranged in a circle
notes: Say exactly twelve stars to avoid the model producing too few.

name: British Pound
flag_desc: dark navy blue base with a simplified Union Jack pattern: red cross plus white overlay

name: Japanese Yen
flag_desc: solid red circle
notes: Keep the prompt simple; subject-ref previously drifted toward 3D styling.

name: Swiss Franc
flag_desc: solid Swiss red circle with one clean centered white Swiss cross
notes: Render exactly one simple white Swiss cross, not extra square blocks. Place large bold black CHF text centered over the cross. No brackets, no side bars, no duplicated cross pieces.

name: Canadian Dollar
flag_desc: red-white vertical split with a subtle small maple leaf hint
notes: Use a plain dollar sign to keep the badge legible.

name: Australian Dollar
flag_desc: blue circle with simplified Union Jack elements and a small star cluster
notes: Subject-ref previously needed retries; default to no subject-ref.

name: New Zealand Dollar
flag_desc: dark blue circle with Southern Cross stars

name: Chinese Yuan
flag_desc: solid red circle

name: Indian Rupee
flag_desc: solid orange saffron circle
notes: Use solid orange instead of a tricolor because prior attempts made the middle band grey.

name: Mexican Peso
flag_desc: vertical tricolor green white red

name: Brazilian Real
flag_desc: solid green circle
notes: Solid green background previously produced sharper results.

name: Turkish Lira
flag_desc: red circle with a white crescent moon and a white five-pointed star
notes: Explicitly require crescent AND five-pointed star.

name: South Korean Won
flag_desc: red and blue taegeuk yin-yang center motif

name: Singapore Dollar
flag_desc: red-white horizontal split
notes: Avoid anthropomorphic/cartoon interpretations; no subject-ref by default.

name: Hong Kong Dollar
flag_desc: red circle with a white bauhinia flower shape

name: Taiwan Dollar
flag_desc: solid red circle

name: Swedish Krona
flag_desc: blue circle with a yellow Nordic cross

name: Norwegian Krone
flag_desc: red circle with a blue and white Nordic cross

name: Danish Krone
flag_desc: red circle with a white Nordic cross

name: Polish Zloty
flag_desc: white-red horizontal stripes

name: Czech Koruna
flag_desc: blue white red simplified tricolor

name: Hungarian Forint
flag_desc: red white green horizontal tricolor

name: Romanian Leu
flag_desc: blue yellow red vertical tricolor

name: Bulgarian Lev
flag_desc: white green red horizontal tricolor

name: Israeli Shekel
flag_desc: blue-white simplified flag treatment
notes: Keep the shekel symbol clear and centered.

name: Chilean Peso
flag_desc: top half blue with one white star in the upper-left, bottom half red
notes: Use a plain dollar sign only; avoid euro or peso symbols.

name: Philippine Peso
flag_desc: blue white red horizontal layout with a small yellow sun motif
notes: Emphasize ultra sharp crisp edges for the peso symbol.

name: Indonesian Rupiah
flag_desc: red-white horizontal split

name: Malaysian Ringgit
flag_desc: blue-yellow treatment with a crescent

name: Thai Baht
flag_desc: red blue white horizontal stripes
notes: Explicitly render the Thai baht symbol, not TBB.

name: Argentine Peso
flag_desc: light blue white light blue horizontal stripes

name: South African Rand
flag_desc: green red blue Y-shape pattern inspired by the South African flag

name: Colombian Peso
flag_desc: three equal horizontal bands: yellow top, blue middle, red bottom
notes: Explicitly forbid glossy ring, 3D border, and bubble frame around the edge.
